testcase.name: runScenario

failure.message: OTP sent notification not displayed! expected [true] but found [false]

testcase.failure: java.lang.AssertionError: OTP sent notification not displayed! expected [true] but found [false] at org.testng.Assert.fail(Assert.java:111) at org.testng.Assert.failNotEquals(Assert.java:1578) at org.testng.Assert.assertTrue(Assert.java:57) at stepdefinitions.EuroSignupLoginSteps.user_should_receive_otp(EuroSignupLoginSteps.java:178) at ✽.user should receive OTP(file:///C:/Users/Omkar.Madav/git/Omkar_Github/axis-remit-automation/src/test/resources/features/EuroSignupLogin.feature:31)
